function G(G)return U[G+(785973-785508)]end for G,u in ipairs({{739638+-739637;781586+-781142},{-287508+287509;-393064-(-393326)},{67849-67586;-674236+674680}})do while u[809174+-809173]<u[741560+-741558]do U[u[-1004592+1004593]],U[u[-153313+153315]],u[906985-906984],u[-968202+968204]=U[u[-70106-(-70108)]],U[u[-411044+411045]],u[-732326+732327]+(-163012+163013),u[992899-992897]-(216085+-216084)end end do local G=math.floor local u=string.len local L=table.insert local c=string.char local end,function(u,c,I,j)local Z,s,n,D,q,e,b,S,y,g,h,i,l,N,H,R,F,r,J,UD,v,x,E,d,w,M,K,O,X,V,A,W,P,t,m while u do if u<-486557+8539792 then if u<180136+4208148 then if u<1867832-(-334114)then if
